text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her outstanding physical abilities,
Maruzensky has attracted so much attention that
fans start calling her Hot Rod even before her
debut.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Adored as a role model by the younger students,
she sets her sights on the greatest of events.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky now aims to take on the Twinkle
Series.
